description_long: This is a traditional push broom with a long, straight wooden handle and a rectangular broom head. The handle is cylindrical and appears to be made of smooth, light-brown wood, extending seamlessly into the broom head. The broom head is block-shaped and features a dense row of short, dark bristles arranged in a straight line along the bottom edge. The bristles are uniform in length and tightly packed, suitable for sweeping large flat surfaces such as sidewalks or garage floors. There are no visible brand markings, grip enhancements, or mounting holes on the handle or head. The overall appearance is clean and well-crafted, with no signs of wear or damage.
description: A classic push broom with a long wooden handle and a rectangular head densely packed with short, dark bristles. The broom is clean, sturdy, and designed for sweeping broad surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the straight wooden handle and the rectangular broom head with a dense row of dark bristles.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the broom head and the straight alignment of the handle, with the bristles visible as a dark strip.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the handle and the back of the broom head with bristles visible along the bottom edge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the broom head's depth and the straight handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, cylindrical wooden handle with a round cross-section and no visible grip enhancements or end caps.
attribute_bristle_arrangement: Bristles are densely packed in a single straight row along the bottom of the rectangular broom head, uniform in length and color.
attribute_mounting_position: Intended to be stored vertically by leaning against a wall; no visible mounting hole or hook.
